prompt.content: Write a Trimester 2 progress report for Mason Brown including his grade average for each of: assessments, quizzes, classwork & practice, homework & independent reading, participation & preparedness, and overall grade average. All assignment and overall grade averages should be rounded to the nearest tenth. Include Mason's name and disability category, and sign it from Mrs. A, mrsA@email.com, 123-456-789. The overall grade average should be calculated by averaging the five category averages together, not by averaging all individual assignment scores. Output the report as a message in the console.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
Mason
Specific Learning Disability (Dyslexia) 

Dear Parent/Guardian of Mason,

I hope this message finds you well. As we close out our Trimester 2 reporting period, I want to share an update on your child’s progress in English Language Arts. 

Mason has been focusing on reading comprehension, vocabulary development, and writing fluency through a variety of engaging lessons and small-group activities. Mason continues to grow in confidence and skill, and I’m proud of the effort they bring to class each day. 

Please see Trimester 2 grade information below. 

Assessments: 67.0%
Quizzes: 62.6%
Classwork & Practice: 66.1%
Homework & Independent Reading: 63.6%
Participation & Preparedness: 72.5%
Trimester 2: 66.4%

Thank you for your continued support and partnership in helping Mason succeed. 

Warm Regards, 

Mrs. A 
mrsA@email.com
123-456-789
